posts.author: CyanScales
posts.title: YOU ALWAYS CHECK, even if you think the patient is unreliable.

quotedTweet.content:
In his final moments, Henry Nowak told police officers nine times “I can’t breathe” and four times that he had been stabbed.

In response police officer dragged him across the gravel, handcuffed and read him his rights. 

It was the last thing Henry heard before he died.

twitter.content:
Male officer: "He says he's been stabbed."

Female officer: "We have to check, don't we?"

Male officer: "No."

I worked in emergency care for years... YOU ALWAYS CHECK, even if you think the patient is unreliable.

The guy is on the ground and clearly in respiratory distress,

posts.title: Matt Walsh: The three most egregious examples of police killing civilians on body cam are Henry Novak, Daniel Shaver, and Tony Timpa. These people all have one thing in common.

twitter.content: The three most egregious body cam videos over the past decade, where cops unequivocally murdered someone or left them to die, are Henry Nowak, Daniel Shaver, and Tony Timpa. These victims have a few things in common. No riots. No murals in their honor. And they were all white.

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Doctors Celebrate Breakthrough Cancer Treatment with Standing Ovation. A drug nearing approval, daraxonrasib, is the first to substantially extend the lives of patients with pancreatic cancer. It targets a cellular protein that fuels nearly all pancreatic tumors, and many lung & colon cancers.

link_metadata.description: Breakthrough pancreatic cancer drug daraxonrasib earns standing ovation at ASCO26 conference.

America deserves secure elections with results on the same night.
